cmd: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d /tmp/lfortran-c-split-consumer-forbid.XXXXXX); trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT; lfortran --backend=c --separate-compilation -c tests/c_backend_tbp_parent_registration_mod_01.f90 -o "$tmpdir/mod.o"; lfortran --backend=c --separate-compilation -I"$tmpdir" -c {infile} -o "$tmpdir/main.o"; (! grep -R -F -q "_lfortran_register_c_type_parent(" "$tmpdir/main.o.tmp.split"/*.c) #
